title: API 认证中间件 (middleware.js)
description: Add authMiddleware to src/server/middleware.js per ARCHITECTURE.md M103 spec. AGENTIC_API_KEY env var: if not set → skip auth (local dev mode). If set → all /api/* and /v1/* routes require Authorization: Bearer <key>. /health and /api/health exempt (ops probes). Return 401 { error: { message, type: authentication_error, code: invalid_api_key } } on failure. ≥4 tests required.
